systems.system_notes: Current femoral intramedullary nailing platform for antegrade proximal and shaft femur fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials describe dedicated T2 Alpha femur instrumentation and operative technique support.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the current femoral nail platform for antegrade GT/PF femur fixation.
The T2 Alpha femur construct includes proximal and distal locking fixation options.
The T2 Alpha femur platform includes end-cap compatibility within the nail construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public T2 Alpha femur page defines the nail platform but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative technique or catalogue pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
